top_signals.title: Oil Extends Drop to Erase Most of Wartime Gains as Supply Swells
top_signals.summary: Oil extended declines and is close to erasing its wartime price gains on signs of swelling supply and progress on a US-Iran peace deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Germany scraps F126 frigate program, pivots to MEKO warships amid cost and contractor chaos
top_signals.summary: Germany Navy leaders have already blessed the fallback ships as capable of meeting NATO capability requirements, but an alliance deadline looms.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Qualcomm to design China-specific data center chip in line with US export curbs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Micron is tech's new margin king as memory crisis pushes company past Nvidia and Meta
top_signals.summary: Micron said in its earnings report that its gross margin jumped to 84.9% from 39% a year ago.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Prediction market polls find US voters prefer federal rules over state patchwork
top_signals.summary: The CFTC has been locked in a tug-of-war with states over who has the ultimate authority over event contracts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jamieson Wellness Explores Selling Itself, Taps BMO and Canaccord to Advise
top_signals.summary: Jamieson Wellness Inc., the Canadian vitamins and supplements maker, is working with Bank of Montreal and Canaccord Genuity Group Inc. to explore a sale, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: Press remarks by Commissioner Hoekstra on the tax simplification package
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 24 Jun 2026 Ladies and gentlemen, a very good afternoon,
 
If there is one thing crystal clear to the Commission, it is that we need to advance our business climate.
